description_long: This is a modern residential house complex composed of multiple interconnected white cubic structures, surrounded by rows of lush green trees and landscaped pathways. The buildings feature flat roofs, some with rooftop terraces, pools, and colorful accent panels. The layout includes open courtyards, outdoor seating areas, and a central tree-lined avenue that divides the property. Large windows and glass doors are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, providing ample natural light and visual interest. The landscaping integrates both paved and green spaces, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design suggests a Mediterranean or modernist influence, with a focus on outdoor living and communal spaces.
description: A modern, multi-unit house complex with flat roofs, white facades, rooftop terraces, and lush landscaping, arranged around a central tree-lined avenue.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main tree-lined avenue, flanked by white cubic buildings and dense rows of trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting rooftop terraces, pools, and the open courtyard layout with visible outdoor seating areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the interconnected structures, asymmetrical window placement, and landscaped green spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the central avenue, multiple building levels, and the integration of trees and pathways.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, open path lined with trees, minimalistic doors, and no prominent porch or columns.
